apple.name: Red Apple
apple.nutrition: High in fiber and Vitamin C
apple.fact: There are over 7,500 varieties of apples grown worldwide. The science of apple growing is called pomology.

banana.name: Banana
banana.nutrition: High in potassium and Vitamin B6
banana.fact: Bananas are technically berries, but strawberries are not. A cluster of bananas is called a hand and a single banana is called a finger.

orange.name: Orange
orange.fact: Oranges are a hybrid between a pomelo and a mandarin. Brazil is the world's largest producer of oranges.

lemon.name: Lemon
lemon.nutrition: Rich in Vitamin C and antioxidants
lemon.fact: Lemons were so rare and valuable in 18th century Europe that wealthy people displayed them as status symbols at dinner parties.

coffee.name: Coffee Mug
coffee.fact: Coffee is the second most traded commodity in the world after oil. Ethiopia is considered the birthplace of coffee.

plant.name: Houseplant
plant.fact: NASA research found that houseplants can remove up to 87% of air toxins in 24 hours. Spider plants are among the most effective.
